entities.description: As a subsection of '1硬件资源', this section describes the peripheral resources integrated on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, including hardware components such as CPU, ROM, RAM, crystal oscillator, power supply, LED, and other peripheral interfaces.
Refers to the central processing unit integrated on the SOM-TL3588 board, which is discussed in section 1.8.
Refers to the read-only memory component on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
Refers to the random-access memory component on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
Refers to the crystal oscillator used for clock generation on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
Refers to the power supply components on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
Refers to the light-emitting diode components on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
Refers to the peripheral interfaces on the SOM-TL3588 board, as mentioned in section 1.8.
